scripts.build: cd packages/tui && npm run build && cd ../ai && npm run build && cd ../agent && npm run build && cd ../coding-agent && npm run build
scripts.build:all: npm run build && npm run build:orchestrator
scripts.check: npm run check:publication-policy && npm run check:startup-profile && biome check --error-on-warnings . && npm run check:pinned-deps && npm run check:ts-imports && npm run check:shrinkwrap && npm run check:install-lock:coding-agent && tsgo --noEmit && npm run check:browser-smoke
scripts.generate:models: npm --prefix packages/ai run generate-models && npm --prefix packages/ai run generate-image-models
scripts.version:patch: npm version patch -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.version:major: npm version major -ws --no-git-tag-version && node scripts/sync-versions.js && npm install --package-lock-only --ignore-scripts
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run check
scripts.publish: node scripts/publication-policy.mjs assert-pi-publish && npm run prepublishOnly && node scripts/publish.mjs
scripts.release:patch: node scripts/publication-policy.mjs assert-pi-publish && node scripts/release.mjs patch
scripts.release:minor: node scripts/publication-policy.mjs assert-pi-publish && node scripts/release.mjs minor
scripts.release:major: node scripts/publication-policy.mjs assert-pi-publish && node scripts/release.mjs major
scripts.release:fix-links: node scripts/publication-policy.mjs assert-pi-publish && node scripts/release-notes.mjs fix-github-releases
